calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-18-2015 Off Calendar

Notice Of Prove Up Hearing For Default Judgment Request
Off Calendar Nov-17-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Charles Crompton, Clerk: A. Mok, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

Dieu-My Mimi Nguyen, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, Zahid Khan
No appearance by defaulted defendant Michael Chau,
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Court ordered Defendants Does 1-20 dismissed without prejudice.

Witness: Zahid Khan Sworn and examined on behalf of Plaintiff.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $10,000.00
Pre-Judgment Interest: $0
Attorney's Fees: $0
Costs: $429.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $10,429.00

Judgment signed in open court.

Off Calendar Aug-17-2015 Continued To Dec-02-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Off Calendar Jul-06-2015 Continued To Sep-02-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
